cast.name: Hillary Clinton
cast.character: Self - At 2003 State of the Union Address

plot outline: Plame's status as a CIA agent was revealed by White House officials allegedly out to discredit her husband after he wrote a 2003 New York Times op-ed piece saying that the Bush administration had manipulated intelligence about weapons of mass destruction to justify the invasion of Iraq.
title: Fair Game
akas: Untitled Plame and Wilson Biopic (United States)
Fair Game - Nichts ist gefährlicher als die Wahrheit (Germany)
